title: Phymatopsis rostrata
taxonomy: Phymatopsis rostrata is classified within the family Blechnaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the water ferns or rock ferns. This family belongs to the order Polypodiales, which comprises a wide range of fern species. The family Blechnaceae is further divided into several genera, and Phymatopsis rostrata is one of the species within this group. The classification of Phymatopsis rostrata is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf structure and spore production. The exact classification of Phymatopsis rostrata is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Blechnaceae, Genus: Phymatopsis.
